metadata.releaseNotes: We’re constantly working to make your experience better. In this update, we’ve fixed several bugs to improve stability and performance across the app. You’ll also notice smoother navigation, faster load times, and a more refined user interface designed to make everything easier to use. These enhancements ensure a more seamless and enjoyable experience every time you open the app. We appreciate your feedback, which helps us continue improving. Stay tuned for more exciting updates and features coming soon. Thank you for using our app and being part of our journey!
metadata.description:
Simplify Your Trading Journey with StockGro – Your All-in-One Stock Market Companion

Unlock smarter investing with StockGro, a powerful platform designed for traders and investors at every level. Experience intelligent insights with our new AI-powered trading tools that bring together expert research and AI stock analysis to help you make confident decisions in the market.

Whether you’re focused on intraday trading, BTST setups, or long-term investing, StockGro combines human expertise, AI investing, and real-time data to support every trading style.

Why Choose StockGro?

→ Expert-Driven Research, Enhanced by AI
 Access trade ideas and stock market recommendations from SEBI-registered research analysts (Registration No: INH000018300), supported by AI stock research and analytics for sharper decision-making.

→ Intraday Screener & Real-Time Signals
 Identify today’s intraday stocks and uncover new opportunities using a smart screener that now integrates AI trading analytics for impro

reviews.title: App taking loading time huge
reviews.content: Last 5 days application taking more than loading time and only processing only. Here need to some solution about that. I m using iPhone 12

reviews.author: Shubham2652
reviews.title: Pathetic App | Trade Ideas Notifications Not Working
reviews.content:
Biggest bug/flow: Trade ideas notification/alert is not working. So if expert choses to close the trade we won’t get notified. 
Second: When we place order via trade ideas screen it doesn’t place order with the price suggested by experts instead it does on market price and without setting stop-loss and targets. 
Third: Pathetic at loading entire app, super slow and some times Trade Ideas screen doesn’t even get refreshed.

reviews.author: myntraminto
reviews.title: Does not work
reviews.content: Trades tab does not working even after paying

reviews.author: User5641
reviews.title: Issues with the app working.
reviews.content: After some time of using the app, the app doesn’t seem to open or function as it should. In such case, deleting and reinstalling the app is required in order for the application to run as it should.

reviews.author: Balaji1805
reviews.title: Lag issues
reviews.content: App keep lagging and didn’t open sometimes .

reviews.author: Shahinpm
reviews.title: Frustrating Experience – No Support & Broken Features
reviews.content: I had high hopes for StockGro, but the experience has been really disappointing. The app constantly shows errors during withdrawals, and customer support is completely unresponsive — even their official email doesn’t work. I tried contacting them through the app, email, and social media with no response. It’s unacceptable for a finance-related app to be this unreliable. Until they fix their withdrawal system and offer proper support, I do NOT recommend using this app.

reviews.author: Tmn_29
reviews.title: safest and easiest stock app
reviews.content: i have used multiple apps for stock market but this has become the one i use everyday. it is very simple to use and even after using it for a very long time, there hasnt been any issues with money transfer and exchange (smth i have faced with other apps) all in all,  very good app.

reviews.author: Raiqahhh
reviews.title: Review
reviews.content: StockGro is an excellent, user-friendly app, perfect for anyone looking to learn about the stock market in a fun and risk-free way. What makes it great is its gamified approach: you get virtual money to trade in real-time competitions, which genuinely speeds up the learning process without risking any actual cash. It’s essentially a social platform where you can test strategies, follow top investors, and get AI-enhanced insights, turning the often-intimidating world of finance into an engaging, low-stakes game.
